Docs

Open Source Software

The open-source stack for independent media.

Sonicverse builds free, community-driven software for broadcasters and independent publishers. So you can own your own infrastructure, and adapt the tools to your needs.

Explore our projectsBecome a contributor

Featured Projects

Interoperable tools within and beyond our ecosystem.

View all →

Audio Streaming Stack

active

Self-hosted Docker Compose stack for live radio with Icecast2, HLS adaptive bitrate, automatic fallback, silence detection, and real-time alerts.

Independent broadcasters & community radio

Explore project →

Media Metadata API

planned

Unified REST API for reading, writing, and normalizing metadata across audio and podcast formats — ID3, Vorbis, MP4, RSS.

Podcast platforms & media archive teams

Explore project →

Broadcast Scheduler

alpha

Open scheduling engine for live and automated radio playout — integrates with Liquidsoap, AzuraCast, and custom station software.

Community radio & college stations

Explore project →

Why Sonicverse

Built for media, by people who worked in the industry.

01

Reliable

Production-ready foundations

Launch with robust building blocks for audio workflows, collaboration, and deployment.

02

Open

Open Governance

Public roadmaps, accountability, and transparent decision-making for accountable stewardship.

03

Flexibility

Composable Stack

A modular architecture that scales from prototypes to production without rewrites.

Frequently Asked Questions

Your questions, answered.

How do I start contributing?

Start with the issues tagged good first issue, read the contribution guide, and open a draft pull request early for feedback.

How are roadmap decisions made?

Based on community feedback, technical feasibility, and alignment with our mission. We prioritize stability, interoperability, and contributor impact.

Do you support partnerships or sponsorships?

Yes. We collaborate with aligned organizations for co-development, educational programs, and ecosystem grants.

Get involved

Build the open future of independent media with us.

Whether you're a developer, broadcaster, or publisher — there's a place for you in the Sonicverse community.

Become a contributorExplore projects

Sonicverse

Open source tools for modern sonic products. Built in public with contributors around the world.
